declarations.description: Form-associated image picker web component with preview UI, validation, custom upload/download bridge support, placeholder and overlay slots, and CSS customization.
declarations.name: JBImageInputWebComponent

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name returned by the name property.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Placeholder title text and accessible aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper text shown in the placeholder message area and exposed as aria description.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Enables required validation. A string value is used as the required validation message.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: When set to true, the hidden native file input accepts multiple files and imageSelected exposes the full FileList. The component still previews and uploads the first selected file.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical component value and native form value. When an uploader is used, this becomes the value resolved by bridge.uploader. Use File, string, FormData, or null when this value must be submitted by a native form. Setting a File previews that file; setting another value calls bridge.downloader to resolve a preview image.

members.name: file
members.description: Currently selected local File, or null when empty.

members.name: imageBase64Value
members.description: Base64/data URL preview image after a local file is read or bridge.downloader resolves.

members.name: acceptTypes
members.description: Comma-separated MIME types assigned to the hidden native file input accept property.

members.name: maxFileSize
members.description: Maximum accepted file size in bytes. Oversized files fail validation and dispatch maxSizeExceed.

members.name: bridge
members.description: Upload/download bridge. uploader(file, config, onProgressCallback) returns the stored/submitted value; downloader(value, config) returns a preview image data URL.

members.name: config
members.description: Developer-defined configuration object passed to bridge.uploader and bridge.downloader.

members.name: multiple
members.description: Controls whether the hidden native file input has the multiple attribute.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Sets the disabled custom state. Current implementation does not block opening the file selector by itself.

members.name: status
members.description: Read-only visual state: empty, uploading, uploaded, or downloaded.

members.name: selectedImageType
members.description: MIME type of the currently selected local file, or undefined before a file is selected.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validation rules that receive { file, value }.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Current native validation message from ElementInternals.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current value differs from initialValue.

methods.name: openImageSelector
methods.description: Opens the hidden native file picker.

methods.name: selectImageByFile
methods.description: Injects a File as if the user selected it, validates it, previews it, and starts bridge.uploader when valid.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and dispatches invalid when invalid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and dispatches invalid when invalid.

methods.name: ExtractBase64ImageFromFile
methods.description: Static helper that reads a File and resolves its data URL.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when a file is selected, upload resolves, or the selected image is deleted.

events.name: imageSelected
events.description: Dispatched after the hidden native file input changes. event.detail.files contains the selected FileList.

events.name: maxSizeExceed
events.description: Dispatched when the selected file is larger than maxFileSize. event.detail.file contains the oversized File.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity or reportValidity finds an invalid value.

slots.name: placeholder
slots.description: Custom content shown while the component status is empty.

slots.name: overlay
slots.description: Replaces the full image overlay shown over the preview image.

slots.name: overlay-content
slots.description: Replaces the default overlay controls while keeping the default overlay container.

cssParts.name: message
cssParts.description: The helper or validation message element inside the default placeholder.

cssStates.name: disabled
cssStates.description: Applied when the disabled property is true.
